title: System styling and import stability
changes: Added a Style tab in Settings for light and dark themes.
Added custom accent color selection with free color input and preset swatches.
Persisted appearance settings through the backend settings file.
Applied the selected accent color to buttons, active navigation states, cards, and form focus states.
Reset stale dashboard selection and side panels after importing instances.
Updated application versioning to 2.3.0.

title: Patch summary rendering and translations
changes: Connected PROJECT_PATCH_SUMMARY.md to the Patch Files page.
Converted the project patch summary file to English-first content.
Added an About system page with translated content and GitHub links.
Added backend parsing for patch summary sections, current version, date, and main area.
Added translated interface labels for the patch summary metadata and known sections.
Included PROJECT_PATCH_SUMMARY.md in the packaged application files.

title: Instance import, backup, and patch documentation
changes: Added instance configuration tools to General settings.
Added JSON import support for configuring multiple instances at once.
Added JSON backup download for the current instance configuration.
Added backend validation and system logs for instance import and backup actions.
Added a project patch summary file to make future GitHub commits easier to prepare.

title: Structured settings and patch detail view
changes: Reorganized General settings into clear HomePage, AI Chat, and system overview categories.
Kept Settings and Patch Files headers fixed while only tab and page content scrolls.
Made recent Git commit entries clickable in Patch Files.
Added commit detail panels with hash, date, subject, and extended descriptions when available.
Updated the application versioning flow for release 2.1.0.

title: Control Panel navigation and secure utility pages
changes: Added sidebar navigation for Home, HomePage, AI Chat, Patch Files, and Settings.
Added configurable HomePage URL in General settings.
Added AI Chat page with server-side provider configuration and bounded chat context.
Added Patch Files page with version notes and recent Git commit history.
Added system log export filters, multiple log formats, and optional cleanup after download.
Moved destructive instance deletion to Settings only.

title: Service cards and execution dashboard
changes: Added service card grid layout.
Added terminal viewer beside selected services.
Added instance creation and editing panel.
Added enable and disable controls for instances.
Added local system logs.
